title: Awesome SMP Season 1
body:
1. Lifesteal Gameplay 
The core mechanic is simple but intense:
 
Kill a player → steal a heart 
 
Die to a player→ lose a heart 
 
Lose all hearts → risk elimination 
 
This creates real stakes, shifting alliances, wars, and unforgettable SMP moments.
 
2. Create Engineering With the Create mod, survival goes beyond vanilla: 
Build factories, farms, and moving contraptions
Automate resources and defenses
Design creative bases and war machines
Whether you're an engineer or PvPer, Create adds depth and progression.
 
3. Proximity Voice Chat Featuring Simple Voice Chat: 
Real-time proximity communication Directional 3D audio Natural roleplay, diplomacy, and betrayals Immersive encounters without needing external apps
 
 
Awesome SMP is community-driven with wars, alliances, events, and content creators.
